requirement_topic.en: O'z DSt / GOST / IEC 62109 Safety Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: O'z DSt / GOST / IEC 62109安全证据
requirement_topic.zht: O'z DSt / GOST / IEC 62109安全證據

summary.en: Uzbekistan standards practice uses O'z DSt national standards, GOST interstate standards, and IEC-aligned standards through O'zstandart conformity routes. For PV inverters, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 safety reports (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems) are commonly relevant technical evidence, especially when a purchaser, bank, EPC contractor, or conformity body asks for internationally recognized inverter safety documentation. Internationally-financed projects (ACWA Power, Masdar, IFC/EBRD-backed) routinely specify IEC 62109 test reports as a minimum lender technical requirement regardless of local minimums.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦标准实践通过O'zstandart符合性路径使用O'z DSt国家标准、GOST州际标准及IEC对齐标准。对于光伏逆变器，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2安全报告（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全）通常是相关技术证据，尤其是在采购方、银行、EPC承包商或符合性机构要求国际认可逆变器安全文件时。国际融资项目（ACWA Power、马斯达尔、IFC/EBRD支持项目）通常将IEC 62109测试报告指定为出借方最低技术要求，不论当地最低标准。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦標準實踐通過O'zstandart符合性路徑使用O'z DSt國家標準、GOST州際標準及IEC對齊標準。對於光伏逆變器，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2安全報告（光伏電力系統用功率變換器安全）通常是相關技術證據，尤其是在採購方、銀行、EPC承包商或符合性機構要求國際認可逆變器安全文件時。國際融資項目（ACWA Power、馬斯達爾、IFC/EBRD支持項目）通常將IEC 62109測試報告指定為出借方最低技術要求，不論當地最低標準。

standards_or_laws: O'z DSt national standards and Uzbekistan national standardization procedures
GOST interstate standards where adopted or referenced
IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems
IEC 62116 — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures for utility-interconnected inverters
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IFC/EBRD lender technical specifications for internationally-financed PV projects

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers often hold IEC 62109 CB scheme reports alongside GB/T 37408-2021 product documentation. For Uzbekistan export, particularly internationally-financed projects, IEC 62109 CB evidence is stronger than a China-only GB/T declaration. However, it still needs model-scope, factory, firmware, and national-deviation review for O'zstandart certification use, and must be supplemented by IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence where lenders require it.
summary.zh: 中国制造商通常在GB/T 37408-2021产品文件之外持有IEC 62109 CB认证报告。对于乌兹别克斯坦出口，尤其是国际融资项目，IEC 62109 CB证据比仅有中国GB/T声明更有利。但仍需针对O'zstandart认证用途审查型号范围、工厂、固件和国家差异，并在出借方要求时补充IEC 62116防孤岛证据。
summary.zht: 中國製造商通常在GB/T 37408-2021產品文件之外持有IEC 62109 CB認證報告。對於烏茲別克斯坦出口，尤其是國際融資項目，IEC 62109 CB證據比僅有中國GB/T聲明更有利。但仍需針對O'zstandart認證用途審查型號範圍、工廠、韌體和國家差異，並在出借方要求時補充IEC 62116防孤島證據。

standards_or_laws: IECEE CB Scheme reports where available

gap.en: Uzbekistan buyers and O'zstandart conformity bodies may accept IEC 62109 as persuasive technical evidence, but the acceptance path is contractual or body-specific. For IFC/EBRD lender-financed projects IEC 62109 (and often IEC 62116) is a firm requirement. Exporters should not assume IEC 62109 automatically resolves O'z DSt, GOST, O'zstandart certification, language, marking, or grid-connection requirements.
gap.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦买方和O'zstandart符合性机构可能将IEC 62109视为有说服力的技术证据，但接受路径取决于合同或机构。对于IFC/EBRD出借方融资项目，IEC 62109（通常还有IEC 62116）是硬性要求。出口商不应假定IEC 62109自动解决O'z DSt、GOST、O'zstandart认证、语言、标识或并网要求。
gap.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦買方和O'zstandart符合性機構可能將IEC 62109視為有說服力的技術證據，但接受路徑取決於合同或機構。對於IFC/EBRD出借方融資項目，IEC 62109（通常還有IEC 62116）是硬性要求。出口商不應假定IEC 62109自動解決O'z DSt、GOST、O'zstandart認證、語言、標識或併網要求。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific for domestic market; often mandatory for internationally-financed projects where IFC/EBRD or lender technical specifications require IEC 62109 and IEC 62116 evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or export-project evidence; GB/T 37408-2021 is the recommended China standard and IEC 62109 is typically used for international certification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62109 and CB reports are useful — and for IFC/EBRD-financed projects often mandatory — but should be mapped into the O'zstandart / O'z DSt / GOST file and not treated as a standalone Uzbekistan approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62109和CB报告有用——对IFC/EBRD融资项目通常为强制要求——但应映射进O'zstandart/O'z DSt/GOST文件，而不是视为独立的乌兹别克斯坦批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62109和CB報告有用——對IFC/EBRD融資項目通常為強制要求——但應映射進O'zstandart/O'z DSt/GOST文件，而不是視為獨立的烏茲別克斯坦批准。
